name: Saltmarch Wanderers
specialty: A tight-knit group known for their unrivaled expertise in navigating the unstable rifts of the Undercity, offering clients safe passage through the city's ever-shifting terrain.

members.name: Elara Thorne
members.note: A stern woman with a scar running down her left cheek, earned during a particularly treacherous rift expedition.

members.name: Thorin Stonebreaker
members.note: A burly dwarf with a cyborg arm, his past as a gladiator in the Outer Wall is a constant reminder of his brutal past.

members.name: Seraphina Shadowwhisper
members.note: A slender elf with a tattoo of a raven on her neck, her quick wit and charm have earned her many allies and enemies in the Sanctum Quarter.

visual: They wear sturdy leather armor and carry a variety of weapons, with Elara's signature scarf often concealing her face in public. Their group is easily identifiable by their shared tabard, emblazoned with the Argent Blades emblem.
reputation_note: Rumored to be former members of the Tower Authority, their loyalty to the Argent Blades remains a mystery, stirring both caution and intrigue among the denizens of the Undercity.
